beats.narration: Two identical indications: same size, same amplitude, same depth. One stays in service; one is cut out. Both decisions are right.

payload.title: OBJECT APPRAISAL
payload.sub: Why identical echoes earn different verdicts.

beats.narration: Evaluation doesn't end at the screen. Object appraisal asks: how was it made, what has it survived, what must it do next?
Manufacturing names the suspects: casting porosity, forging laps, weld cracks. Then service: anything new or grown since the last exam is an active mechanism. Escalate.

payload.heading: Part history names the suspects
payload.note: NEW OR GROWN = ACTIVE MECHANISM — ESCALATE

beats.narration: Intended use: a planar flaw across cyclic tension is the worst case. Cold service steals toughness. And a crane hook is not a handrail.
Weigh history, service, duty. Then write a trail another inspector could follow cold. Significance lives in the object, not the screen.

payload.sub: Significance lives in the object — not the screen.
